recovered_memory: Canonical queue snapshots and append-only queue updates are separate temporal layers; current state requires ordered reconciliation while historical claims remain attached to their original blobs.
privacy_boundary: Only public repository state, public commit metadata, and public queue-update records were used.

limits: No deterministic materialized current-view manifest was present or produced in this slice.
Commit existence proves repository history, not semantic correctness of every queue-update payload.
No private chat or uploaded-file content was inspected.

falsification_route: Fetch every cited source and compare timestamps, paths, and additive commit history. Reject the recovered rule if later evidence shows queue-update files replace or mutate prior history rather than append to it.
